title: Muck Mobs
description: A Mod that adds Muck Mobs!
body:
![Image about Muck Mobs in Minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34d4a4d2fbbd3e9abd0e48b86a48beb8cd34427f.png)

**Note: This mod doesn't generate the mobs in the world like minecraft mobs, For spawning them you need to do it with commands or using spawn eggs.**  

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

This Mod is the second mod of my MuckCraft Modpack

Require Fabric API & Geckolib

🔰 Mobs Drops 🔰

![All Mobs Drops](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4beabc0eaa62e91aac9ed3c399c744fd1ed54d5f.jpeg)
